selected_title: Study on Relationship between Knowledge Absorptive Capacity and Performance Based on the View of Corporate Entrepreneurship
question: What operational artifact in “Study on Relationship between Knowledge Absorptive Capacity and Performance Based on the View of Corporate Entrepreneurship” could make the Absorptive capacity feedback loop auditable?

evidence_spans.text: This article considers the relationships among the knowledge absorptive capacity,prior knowledge,organization coordination,RD investment and firm performance to form a new analysis framework and put forward a comprehensive model and hypothesis.The main proposition is that prior knowledge,organization coordination,RD investment affect the knowledge absorptive capacity of established enterprises and the knowledge absorptive capacity promotes the firm performance.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Business through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 55 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
